request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Write a 2-3 sentence storyline summary (≤500 chars total) of the regulatory pressure history for this prediction-market contract. For 'retrospective' kind, write past tense and reference the actual resolution. For 'active' kind, write present tense and note what's still pending. Return JSON {text: ...}.
request.user:
Contract: Will Bitcoin be above $109,999.99 by Dec 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET?
Kind: active
Timeline (20 events):
- 2026-05-19 [A] CFTC Sues Minnesota to Block State Law — CFTC suing to block a state law preserves national crypto regulatory clarity, modestly increasing odds BTC reaches $110k.
- 2026-05-15 [A] CME | Implementation of the Nasdaq CME Crypto Index Futures Market Maker Program | [2] — CME's market‑maker program boosts liquidity and price discovery in crypto futures, modestly increasing odds BTC reaches $110k.
- 2026-05-13 [A] CME | Expansion of the Trading and ClearingHours for all Cryptocurrency Futures and Options on Futures Contracts. | [1] — Extended CME crypto futures/options hours boost liquidity and price discovery, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $110k and making such a move more likely sooner.
- 2026-05-13 [background] CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Options 24/7 Weekend Market MakerProgram | [2] — CME's 24/7 weekend options market‑maker program increases weekend liquidity, likely reducing weekend price gaps and lowering chance of a >$110k spike.
- 2026-05-13 [A] CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Futures 24/7 Weekend Market Maker Program | [2] — CME's 24/7 weekend market-maker program increases continuous futures liquidity and price discovery, likely damping weekend spot spikes and slightly lowering chance of a >$109,999 print.
- 2026-05-08 [A] Self-Regulatory Organizations; The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC; Notice of Filing of Proposed Rule Change, as Modified by Amendment No. 1 Thereto, to List and Trade Shares of iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF under Nasdaq Rule 5711(d) (CommodityBased Trust... — SEC notice to list BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF signals potential new institutional demand for BTC, modestly raising odds of >$109,999.
- 2026-05-07 [background] GMNI - Liquidity Incentive Program - 05/07/2026 — CFTC notice on Gemini's liquidity incentive program may slightly increase BTC trading liquidity and marginally raise odds of a >$110k print, but is indirect.
- 2026-04-16 [A] CME | Modifications to the Event Contract… - 04/16/2026 — CFTC modifications to CME event contracts can alter bitcoin derivatives liquidity/volatility, modestly affecting odds CF index hits $110k in 2026.
- 2026-04-16 [A] COIN | Crypto Market Maker Program - 04/16/2026 — CFTC note on Coinbase market‑maker program could modestly boost liquidity/derivatives flow on an index provider venue, slightly raising odds BTC > $110k.
- 2026-04-16 [background] COIN | Modifications to implement hard limits… - 04/16/2026 — CFTC rule changes to implement hard limits for Coinbase/COMEX derivatives could curb price/volatility, slightly lowering chance of a brief spike above $110k.
- 2026-04-07 [background] FinCEN Proposes Rule to Fundamentally Reform Financial Institution Programs Designed to Fight Illicit Finance — Proposed FinCEN AML reforms could modestly curb crypto on/off‑ramps and institutional flows, slightly lowering odds BTC tops $109,999 in 2026.
- 2026-03-19 [background] Regulatory Capital Rule: Regulatory Capital and Standardized Approach for Risk-weighted Assets — A regulatory capital rule can change banks' willingness to hold crypto and thus BTC demand/price, but this record gives no crypto-specific details so effect is indirect.
- 2026-03-19 [background] Regulatory Capital Rule: Category I and II Banking Organizations, Banking Organizations with Significant Trading Activity, and Optional Adoption for Other Banking Organizations — Bank capital/trading rules can alter banks' crypto market participation and slightly shift BTC demand, but effects are indirect and direction unclear.
- 2026-02-12 [A] CFE Cboe Bitcoin Continuous Futures Lead Market Maker Program Amendment [2] — CFE's amendment to the Bitcoin futures lead market-maker program can modestly boost liquidity and price discovery, slightly increasing odds BTC tops $110k.
- 2026-02-03 [background] ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Market Maker Program — CFTC-backed ICE market-maker program likely raises futures liquidity and participation, slightly increasing odds BTC hits $110k but doesn't determine outcome.
- 2026-02-03 [A] ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Liquidity Provider Program — CFTC-backed ICE crypto futures liquidity program could modestly increase liquidity/price discovery, slightly raising odds BTC crosses $110k in 2026.
- 2026-01-29 [A] COIN | Modifications to the Perp Style Futures Market Maker Program — CFTC changes to Coinbase Derivatives' perp market‑maker program can alter BTC liquidity/volatility, modestly nudging odds of hitting $109,999.99 in 2026.
- 2025-12-17 [A] CME - Modifications to the CME Commodity Trading Advisors/Hedge Fund Incentive Program — CME incentive changes could increase hedge‑fund/CTA activity on CME futures (including Bitcoin futures), modestly raising odds BTC tops $110k in 2026.
- 2025-12-12 [A] Litigation Releases: Nathan Gauvin; Blackridge, LLC; Gray Digital Capital Management USA, LLC; Gray Digital Technologies, LLC — SEC litigation releases targeting crypto firms raise regulatory risk and likely reduce the probability BTC exceeds $109,999 in 2026.
- 2025-12-08 [A] Acting Chairman Pham Announces Launch of Digital Assets Pilot Program for Tokenized Collateral in Derivatives Markets — CFTC pilot enabling tokenized collateral likely increases institutional liquidity/leverage in crypto derivatives, raising odds BTC tops $110k in 2026.

response.text: Since late 2025, US crypto derivatives venues (CME, CFE, ICE, Coinbase) expand liquidity and 24/7 market-maker programs, deepening markets but likely damping weekend spikes. SEC enforcement and proposed AML/bank-capital changes add headwinds, while a Nasdaq filing for BlackRock's Bitcoin Premium Income ETF and a CFTC suit to block a Minnesota law remain pending. Net pressure is mildly supportive for BTC clearing $110k.
